title: All 30 Dow stocks fall, with Home Depot and UnitedHealth stocks the biggest point drags
text: The 1,000-point plunge in the Dow Jones Industrial Average DJIA, -3.23% is unanimous, with all 30 components losing ground. The biggest drags on the Dow were shares of Home Depot Inc. HD, -5.18% , which tumbled $14.97 (4.8%), and UnitedHealth Group Inc. INC, +0.05% , which dropped $14.18 (2.8%), to shave about a combined 192 points off the Dow's price.

title: Dow advances to #15 on DiversityInc's 2022 Top 50 Companies for Diversity list
text: 5th consecutive year recognized for management of inclusion, diversity and equity Dow also earned a spot on six specialty lists MIDLAND, Mich. , May 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dow (NYSE: DOW) advanced to 15th place on the 2022 DiversityInc Top 50 Companies for Diversity list, which was announced yesterday at DiversityInc's celebratory event in New York City.
